name: Esther Blanchett
description:
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Today is January 7th. What's not a reason to think about one of my favorite animes, the «Trinity Blood»? I congratulate all Catholics on this holiday. I also congratulate Protestants, even if the holiday is considered December 25th. (I may be confusing, because I myself have nothing to do with religions.) Anyway, I congratulate everyone on this holiday. The atheist wishes you the blessing and mercy of the Creator, if any exists.
creator: Toffincom
